title: Remake Our Life!
subTitle: Faced with the opportunity to return to the past and try to change things once again, Kyoya must decide what he wants to do.

title: Black Clover
subTitle: In a magical world, Asta and Yuno, two childhood friends, keep their promise and battle against each other to win the title of Emperor Magnus.

title: Black Clover
subTitle: In a magical world, Asta and Yuno, two childhood friends, keep their promise and battle against each other to win the title of Emperor Magnus.

title: Fruits Basket
subTitle: The new school year begins with Tohru meeting Momiji and Hatsuharu's bold uniforms, drawing attention from the student council. Akito's arrival unsettles Yuki and Tohru steps in to support him.

title: Fruits Basket
subTitle: Tohru Honda, a high school student, starts living with the Sohma family and discovers an unusual curse that has been cast upon them.

title: Remake Our Life!
subTitle: Kyoya decides to step in and do whatever he can to salvage the project that the management of his company is running into the ground.
